ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user */,
  "friend_count" INTEGER /* Number of friends the user has on the platform */,
  "review_count" INTEGER /* Total number of reviews submitted by the user */,
  "photo_count" INTEGER /* Number of photos uploaded by the user */,
  "rating" REAL /* Average rating given by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* User's email for communication */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* User's phone number for additional contact */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date when the user joined the platform */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile picture */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last time the user logged in */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Brief bio or description about the user */,
  "verified" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user's account is verified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who submitted the review */,
  "restaurant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the restaurant being reviewed */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the review was submitted */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text body of the review */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL link to the restaurant's page */,
  "rating" REAL /* Numerical rating given by the user */,
  "service_rating" REAL /* Rating for the service */,
  "food_quality_rating" REAL /* Rating for the food quality */,
  "ambiance_rating" REAL /* Rating for the ambiance */,
  "value_rating" REAL /* Rating for the value for money */,
  "is_anonymous" INTEGER /* Indicates if the review is anonymous */,
  "is_flagged" INTEGER /* Indicates if the review has been flagged for moderation */,
  "is_deleted" INTEGER /* Indicates if the review has been deleted */,
  "edited_at" TEXT /* Last time the review was edited */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_restaurant_id FOREIGN KEY ("restaurant_id") REFERENCES restaurants ("restaurant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "restaurants" (
  "restaurant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each restaurant */,
  "restaurant_name" TEXT /* Name of the restaurant */,
  "location" TEXT /* Physical location of the restaurant */,
  "average_rating" REAL /* Average rating calculated from all reviews */,
  "cuisine" TEXT /* Type of cuisine served */,
  "opening_hours" TEXT /* Opening hours of the restaurant */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number for contact */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the restaurant's website */,
  "menu_url" TEXT /* URL of the restaurant's menu */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the restaurant is active */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the restaurant information was updated */,
  "verified" INTEGER /* Indicates if the restaurant's account is verified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("restaurant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "restaurant_reviews" (
  "restaurant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the restaurant being reviewed */,
  "total_reviews" INTEGER /* Total number of reviews submitted for the restaurant */,
  "average_rating" REAL /* Calculated average rating based on reviews */,
  "total_service_rating" REAL /* Total service rating based on reviews */,
  "total_food_quality_rating" REAL /* Total food quality rating based on reviews */,
  "total_ambiance_rating" REAL /* Total ambiance rating based on reviews */,
  "total_value_rating" REAL /* Total value rating based on reviews */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the review statistics were updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("restaurant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "moderation" (
  "moderation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each moderation action */,
  "review_id" INTEGER /* ID of the review being moderated */,
  "action_taken" TEXT /* Description of the action taken (e.g., approved, flagged, removed) */,
  "moderator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the moderator who took the action */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date when the moderation action was taken */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Original review text for reference */,
  "moderation_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the moderation action */,
  "is_escalated" INTEGER /* Indicates if the moderation action has been escalated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("moderation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_moderation_review_id FOREIGN KEY ("review_id") REFERENCES reviews ("review_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., customer, restaurant manager, admin) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Description of permissions associated with the role */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Indicates if the role is the default role for new users */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last time the role was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-role association */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  "is_primary" INTEGER /* Indicates if the role is the primary role for the user */,
  "assigned_at" TEXT /* Date when the role was assigned to the user */,
  "expires_at" TEXT /* Date when the role expires (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics record */,
  "restaurant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the restaurant for which the analytics is created */,
  "total_reviews" INTEGER /* Total number of reviews for the restaurant */,
  "average_rating" REAL /* Calculated average rating */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the analytics record was last updated */,
  "total_service_rating" REAL /* Total service rating based on reviews */,
  "total_food_quality_rating" REAL /* Total food quality rating based on reviews */,
  "total_ambiance_rating" REAL /* Total ambiance rating based on reviews */,
  "total_value_rating" REAL /* Total value rating based on reviews */,
  "most_frequent_complaints" TEXT /* Most frequent complaints from reviews */,
  "most_frequent_praises" TEXT /* Most frequent praises from reviews */,
  "trend_analysis" TEXT /* Trend analysis data */,
  "sentiment_score" REAL /* Overall sentiment score */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_restaurant_id FOREIGN KEY ("restaurant_id") REFERENCES restaurants ("restaurant_id")
)
